rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};`
Use `assign` only for implementation-level bindings when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations are available
Write output dependency guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type annexes
generic_rules: Use exact current-case names from the model index for all identifiers
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
Use visible identifiers and avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Place assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations in component type annexes
Place assignments in component implementation annexes when valid in that scope
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not invent ports/components or copy identifiers from examples
